title: El Jadida, Casablanca-Settat — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

El Jadida is a city in Casablanca-Settat with a population of 194,000. A port city with a UNESCO-listed Portuguese fortress, popular with expats and retirees for its relaxed lifestyle.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
